confirmedDefects.description: BundleValidatorService, BundleActivationOrchestratorService, and BundleStatusTrackerService lacked @Injectable() and did not extend MicroserviceBase.
confirmedDefects.fix: Added @Injectable(), MicroserviceBase inheritance, ServiceDescriptor metadata, and FLOW_SCOPED portability annotations.

confirmedDefects.description: The universal activation DRY_RUN-before-FULL rule was tagged as CF-825 in FLOW-00/FLOW-47 references while the canonical FLOW-00 contract assigns that rule to CF-826.
confirmedDefects.fix: Retagged DRY_RUN-before-FULL references to CF-826 and retagged additive FREEDOM config references to CF-828.

confirmedDefects.description: BundleActivationPage used the generic AdminCrudPanel for platform-admin operations.
confirmedDefects.fix: Replaced the raw index panel with a purpose-built activation operations panel and updated Playwright expectations.

commands.result: 2 passed, 2 skipped because localhost:3000 was not running; operations panel UI checks passed
